overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character navigating through a dark jungle environment with ancient stone ruins at night. The character moves from an enclosed forest path through a ruined outpost area, then climbs a wall to reveal a sweeping vista of a distant temple complex with burning fires and large spherical structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense jungle path with ancient stone ruins

events.description: tutorial text appears explaining thermal vision hiding mechanics
character crouches down to hide in vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking through dense jungle path and crouching in vegetation to hide from thermal detection

entered.detail: weathered stone walls and structures lining the jungle path
thick tropical foliage and trees surrounding the path
orange firelight visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow jungle path surrounded by dense vegetation and ancient stone ruins. The environment is dark with limited visibility under the tree canopy. The character crouches in the vegetation as a tutorial about hiding from thermal vision appears on screen.

events.description: emerging from dense jungle into more open ruined area with abandoned vehicle
character begins climbing up a stone wall to reach higher ground

agents.ego_description: navigating through ruined structures and climbing a stone wall to reach the overlook

entered.detail: derelict vehicle with red taillight glowing in the darkness
makeshift wooden fences and barriers blocking parts of the path
bright white searchlight sweeping across the ruins
vertical stone wall with handholds leading upward

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a ruined outpost area featuring abandoned military vehicles, wooden barricades, and searchlights. The environment transitions from dense jungle to a more open stone-paved area with building ruins. The segment ends as the character begins climbing a stone wall.

events.description: climbing over the wall reveals a wide open vista of a distant burning city
character stops and slows to observe the distant view

agents.ego_description: standing at cliff edge slowly panning to observe the distant temple complex and burning structures

entered.detail: large illuminated spherical buildings floating or standing in the distance
orange glowing lights and fires floating in the sky above the city
massive temple structures with spires visible in the valley below
rocky precipice overlooking the vast jungle valley

segments.scene_description: After climbing the wall, the scene opens to a breathtaking vista overlooking a vast valley. The character stands at a cliff edge observing a distant ancient temple complex with massive spherical structures and floating fires illuminating the night sky. The camera slowly pans across the panoramic view of the burning city below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of a dark jungle into a sweeping panoramic vista of an ancient city. It begins with the character navigating a narrow path through dense vegetation and stone ruins, crouching low under a heavy tree canopy with limited visibility. As the character advances, the environment opens into a ruined outpost filled with abandoned military vehicles and searchlights, shifting from wild greenery to stone-paved ruins. The camera then follows the character as they climb a high stone wall, causing the enclosed space to suddenly expand into a breathtaking view from a cliff edge. Finally, the scene reveals a vast valley below, where the camera pans across a distant temple complex featuring massive spherical structures and floating fires illuminating the night sky.
